news.title: New ACIP charter broadens criteria for members, calls for review of alternatives to vaccines
news.summary: A new charter for the panel that advises the CDC on vaccine use substantially refocuses the responsibilities of the committee, downplaying its role in recommending the use of new vaccines.

news.title: STAT+: At BIO 2026, industry wrestled with Washington politics, and making AI work better
news.summary: Biotech executives reveal concerns over Chinese biotech, the profitability of AI, and the durability of Trump's drug price moves.

news.title: The mysterious case of Eli Lilly’s obesity drug
news.summary: Who got exclusive access to Eli Lilly's highly anticipated obesity candidate? And why are drugmakers spending so much on acquisitions? Find out on this week's "Readout LOUD."

news.title: STAT+: Cassidy proposes bill to rein in 340B drug discount program
news.summary: Placing new limits on the 340B drug discount program would be a fresh challenge for hospitals as they confront funding cuts.

news.title: Supreme Court ruling blocks thousands of lawsuits against maker of Roundup weedkiller
news.summary: The Supreme Court sided with the maker of Roundup weedkiller in a ruling expected to block thousands of lawsuits alleging it failed to warn people the product could cause cancer.

news.title: STAT+: Proposed CDC science office could tighten political control at agency
news.summary: Under President Trump, political leaders are exerting more control across federal health agencies.

news.title: STAT+: Democrats press White House on who got special access to Eli Lilly’s new obesity drug
news.summary: The unusual access to an experimental drug has captured the attention of the American public as well.

news.title: STAT+: Next-gen CRISPR tools improve editing accuracy in embryos, but also stoke ethical concerns
news.summary: The use of genome editing in early embryos has pulled back the curtain on the role of one of the key genes that orchestrates the first stages of human development,…

news.title: STAT+: The China debate gets louder in Washington
news.summary: A boom in GLP-1s and health care costs, AI-designed hair growth drugs, and more biotech news from The Readout

news.title: STAT+: FDA’s breakthrough pipeline fills up with generative AI devices
news.summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: FDA drops enforcement against Whoop, more AI devices get FDA 'breakthrough' label, and more.

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about weight loss drug spending, launch prices for medicines, and much more
news.summary: The latest pharmaceutical news from the Pharmalot campus via the Pharmalittle newsletter

news.title: STAT+: FDA gives generative AI in radiology two breakthrough designation nods
news.summary: FDA has granted breakthrough designation to two devices that use generative AI to interpret chest X-rays and draft the radiology reports.

news.title: Another roadblock for DOJ campaign against trans health
news.summary: New bill proposes expanding methadone access, $5.7 trillion on U.S. health care, and more health news from Morning Rounds

news.title: STAT+: Facing a brutal run, battered vaccine makers still see cause for hope
news.summary: It's an unusual time to be in the vaccine business. But in the view of those gathered at the BIO conference this week, it’s not altogether a bleak one.

news.title: Opinion: My adult daughter has Down syndrome. Her life is entirely different from what experts expected
news.summary: “Women are fully capable of making difficult decisions, but meaningful choice requires trusted, vetted information,” writes Michelle Sie Whitten of the Global Down Syndrome Foundation.

news.title: Cassidy's new plan to overhaul 340B: Rebates, contract pharmacy limits and more changes
news.summary: A legislative discussion draft shared Thursday by the Senate HELP chairman includes rebates, contract pharmacy limits, narrowed definitions and other proposals.

news.title: With Medicare's GLP-1 'bridge' coming soon, Walmart expands weight management supports for consumers
news.summary: Medicare's GLP-1 Bridge program goes into effect next week, so Walmart is rolling out new supports aimed at helping beneficiaries understand their weight management options.

news.title: Democrats to propose bill capping out-of-pocket costs for Medicare enrollees
news.summary: Sen. Ron Wyden and 14 Democratic co-sponsors plan to introduce legislation Thursday to cap consumers’ potential out-of-pocket costs in traditional Medicare, resurfacing a long-running debate over why the program doesn’t limit beneficiary spending.

news.title: Oracle partners with Theator to expand AI-powered surgical documentation to operating rooms
news.summary: Oracle Health, owned by tech giant Oracle after it acquired EHR company Cerner in 2022, is ramping up its AI capabilities while also expanding its AI ecosystem through partnerships.

news.title: Judge blocks narrowed definition of 'professional degree' for federal student loan caps
news.summary: Plaintiff provider associations cheered the decision, as the rule's definition would have barred advanced practice students from a higher borrowing limit.

news.title: Upside secures $20M series A to expand healthcare-focused housing platform
news.summary: The company plans to use the funding simultaneously across Medicaid, Medicare Advantage and employer-sponsored markets.

news.title: Fierce Healthcare Layoff Tracker—St. Charles cuts 45 leadership roles; MU Health Care lays off 74
news.summary: Stick with this tracker for the latest layoff and workforce updates from across healthcare.

news.title: TigerConnect expands AI-driven platform with new scheduling capabilities
news.summary: The new platform offers real-time AI-generated gap detection and intelligent assignment logic for schedule balancing.

news.title: First Stop Health expands weight management program, shares first-year results
news.summary: During the first year, one employer saw 100% of participants lose weight over 12 months, the company says.

news.title: Infinitus launches risk detection system to ensure appropriate patient triage from AI agents
news.summary: The solution—dubbed Clinical Escalations—continuously assesses risk during interactions, allowing reclassification of events to emergent clinical situations.

news.title: Assort Health scores $120M series C to scale voice AI agent platform for healthcare
news.summary: Assort Health has a large proprietary specialty dataset built on 190 million patient interactions, 62,000 care protocols and 1.6 million decision pathways.

news.title: Kaiser Health Plan ordered to pay hospital $82M over insufficient reimbursement
news.summary: A drawn-out legal back-and-forth between Kaiser Health Plan and Pomona Valley Hospital over out-of-network emergency care reimbursement hinged on the terms of a previously terminated contract, making the case "a useful reminder that a terminated contract is not always a dead document.”

news.title: Fosun Pharma plots global push beyond oncology, fueled by multi-asset Alzheimer’s strategy
news.summary: In a recent interview with Fierce, Fosun Pharma co-president, Xinli Wang, M.D., Ph.D., detailed how the company leveraged two recent deals to quickly build up its portfolio in Alzheimer’s disease as part of a multi-step roadmap to establish its independent capabilities in the U.S.

news.title: BIO 2026: How a gut feeling transformed cancer treatment forever
news.summary: Dr. Israel Lowy remembers the days when he and his oncology immunotherapy colleagues were assigned tables in the distant east wing of the American Society of Clinical Oncology conference in Chicago. They would watch aficionados walk by, scoffing at these iconoclastic researchers pushing an alternative way to treat cancer.

news.title: Otsuka posts phase 3b ADHD trial win ahead of looming FDA approval decision
news.summary: A phase 3b trial of Otsuka’s attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder prospect has hit its primary endpoint, strengthening the drugmaker’s hand weeks before a potential U.S. launch of the therapy.

news.title: With $15M discovery deal, Boehringer becomes latest Big Pharma to buy into Immunai’s AI platform
news.summary: TechBio outfit Immunai is continuing its parade of Big Pharma partnerships with its third such pact this year, this time with German drugmaker Boehringer Ingelheim.

news.title: FDA drops blood pressure device enforcement against Whoop
news.summary: The FDA has sent an End of Enforcement notice to consumer wearable device company Whoop, putting a formal end to the agency’s investigation into its blood pressure tech use.

news.title: Ionis bags $30M from Recordati for ex-US rights to near-approval rare disease prospect
news.summary: Ionis Pharmaceuticals has offloaded regional rights to its near-approval rare disease asset zilganersen, pocketing $30 million upfront from Recordati for an ex-U.S. license to the drug candidate.

news.title: Spurned by FDA, Passage Bio finds exit through merger with Remix
news.summary: Passage Bio, the Philadelphia-based gene therapy outfit that launched a strategic review earlier this year after tough feedback from the FDA, has found an exit in an all-stock reverse merger with RNA specialist Remix Therapeutics.

news.title: Icon names Microsoft tech partner as Q1 results grow analyst confidence
news.summary: Irish CRO giant Icon this week made Microsoft its technology partner as the organization advances its plan to increase investment in AI over the next three years. Microsoft’s Copilot and data infrastructure will be implemented enterprise-wide to further scale Icon’s agentic AI platform, Orbis.

news.title: Mapp, Gilead antivirals to be deployed in DRC Ebola trial: WHO chief
news.summary: Officials are planning to study Mapp Biopharmaceutical’s MBP134 and Gilead Sciences’ remdesivir, which gained prominence during the COVID-19 pandemic, against the Bundibugyo ebolavirus.

news.title: Nature retracts provocative PD-1 study that tied lung cancer survival to treatment timing
news.summary: After a four-month investigation, Nature Medicine has decided to pull a viral study that linked early-day PD-1/chemo treatment to a massive survival benefit versus late-day infusion in non-small cell lung cancer.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Layoff Tracker 2026: ADC Tx slims workforce by 17%; Sangamo sheds staff
news.summary: As always, if you know of layoffs occurring at a biotech, please reach out to the Fierce Biotech editorial team.

news.title: RQ Bio reels in $115M to take long-acting flu prevention antiviral into clinic
news.summary: Amid a bustling fundraising week for biotechs, the U.K.’s RQ Bio is adding $115 million to its coffers to advance a long-acting antibody for flu prevention.

news.title: 抢体脂秤、AI做「搭子」，第一批网友冲向阿福减重
news.summary: 普通人减肥不用焦虑了。

news.title: 主题圆桌：生命的新算法，AI重构医疗产业全链路｜36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
news.summary: WAVES2026圆桌：AI+医疗，探讨产业落地下一步

news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜阿福“科学减重1亿斤”行动正式上线；B站：预计到明年，视频播客日均播放时长有望达到3亿分钟
news.summary: 高考出分三日，千问志愿大模型为考生生成500万份志愿报告

papers.title: OpenBioRQ: Unsolved Biomedical Research Questions for Agents
papers.summary: A working citation looks like proof -- but the fact that a link resolves does not mean the cited paper supports the claim. I find that current agentic models rarely fabricate citations (over 99% resolve), yet roughly 15.9% link to the wrong paper. Existing benchmarks miss this failure mode: when a question has a fixed answer key, a model can reproduce the expected source from that key rather than independently verifying that the source supports the claim. I introduce \openbiorq{}, a retrieval-grounded agentic benchmark of 12{,}553 unsolved biomedical research questions across 12 domains that t

papers.title: Plans Don't Persist: Why Context Management Is Load Bearing for LLM Agents
papers.summary: Long-horizon agents depend on context management: systems compress, summarize, and evict old tokens so tasks can continue beyond finite windows. That is safe only when dropped information is no longer needed or has been internalized. Plans are the stress case: they are written early, used for many steps, and first to be evicted. We introduce replay pairing, a diagnostic that runs the same trajectory with and without the plan in history and measures hidden-state cosine distance. On Llama-3.1-70B, plan signal spikes to 0.453 one step after the plan, then falls 4.1x in a single action-observation

papers.title: EBench: Elemental Diagnosis of Generalist Mobile Manipulation Policies
papers.summary: We present EBench, a simulation benchmark that diagnoses generalist mobile manipulation policies beyond a single success-rate scalar. EBench comprises 26 diverse and challenging manipulation tasks annotated along 5 capability dimensions and 4 generalization dimensions. We evaluate state-of-the-art generalist manipulation models including π_0, π_{0.5}, XVLA, and InternVLA-A1, and reveal that models with near success rates exhibit strikingly different capability profiles: π_{0.5} achieves the highest test success rate and the best train--test retention, whereas InternVLA-A1 dominates mobile mani
